description: Paper-trading track record — 100% SIMULATED. No real money, no wallet, no keys. Updated each time the user says 'go' with live price data.

rules.control: optional parallel random pick, to test signals vs luck
rules.marking: each 'go', the prior open position is marked to the new price, then a new pick is opened
rules.data_source: live prices via the assistant's WebSearch tool (no user API keys used)
rules.caveat: WebSearch prices carry ~±3% source noise; rounds spaced <~1 day apart are dominated by noise, not real moves

open_positions.name: Bonk
open_positions.thesis: Largest, most-liquid Solana meme by community; consolidating. Deliberately a base-buy on a deep-liquidity name rather than chasing PUNCH (+80,000% since launch, ~$30M cap) which is a classic blow-off-top risk.

closed_trades.name: Pudgy Penguins
closed_trades.note: Marked with ~no elapsed time since entry — result is within source noise, not a real move.
